Halo_29Colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$1
}%11111111_11111111_11111011_11110000,{   'index=$2
}%11111111_10100000_10100000_10100100,{   'index=$3
}%11111111_01100000_01100000_01000000,{   'index=$4
}%11111111_10000000_10000000_10000000,{   'index=$5
}%11111111_01000000_01000000_01000000     'index=$6
     'Total number of colors = $7 = 7 (decimal)
